reviews.text: The care I received was very good, professional, courteous and timely.  I went there to pick up a pump for Type 1 diabetes and as I say, I was very well looked after clinically. …

The management / support staff are extremely bad, I was chasing them to send my medical records for WEEKS, no one picks up the phone, or they transfer you to someone who never picks up. Caused me so much stress to get basic information sent …

As my review of this place was no longer available to the public (may have been removed 🤔), I am writing a new one. I wonder if the London Medical could explain why my review wasn’t available to the public anymore. I’m just curious. That’s …

This is the first time I have ever submitted a negative review.
Although the medical staff I saw were excellent, I cannot say the same about the accounts department manager and the reception manager Lindell Dawson. …

** UPDATE **
So David asked me to email him. I have and so has my partner. Seems like nothing is being done honestly and the response to bad reviews is just so they can show …

Usually I don't leave review at all but not this time.
Avoid this place, they are interested only in your money !!!
My daughter had referral from other private clinic to see specialist doctor …

No respect, unprofessional, trash.
Nikos Stamos no good, disrespectful. Trying to make money from patient rather than being honest, lies to client about their nerve compression symptoms saying …

Astonishingly poor. The doctor I saw was preoccupied far, far more with my money than with my care. After telling me there was a ‘real possibility’ my symptoms could be signs of a rare form of cancer, she disappeared into the ether. I could …

Unprofessional and unfriendly, less diabetic specialist and more government lawyer. Didnt bother looking at the data at all. These guys  are just in it for the money. Make you come back again and again and again for reviews that will never …

I was booked here by DVLA for a medical fitness review. I hoped to see a doctor on behalf of DVLA, but I got the DVLA on behalf of a doctor, the gentleman that saw me knew the highway code backwards, just as well, because  he couldn't tell his @$$ from his elbow medically. Total waste of time.

They take 300£ to seat on chair to listen the doctor about the diabetic type 1 he explains to us , I was expecting from Professor Greene to check my pomp and he doesn’t, to show us how is works and everything,,, I was asking a simple latter …
The doctor I saw was fine but the nurses, reception staff are quite rude and surly. There’s a cold and corporate atmosphere

They value their cancellation fee policy more than a long term client
To me this is a deal breaker as it shows a corporate greed mindset which I do not wish to indulge
Last minute cancellation of travel vaccination booking. Very unimpressed!
Avoid like the plague!! Better off with a GP!

Extremely poor for the price you pay. Waited an extra 15 minutes for the appointment, found the information I had provided hadn't been communicated to the physician, was hit by an extra charge of £375 I wasn't warned about for a diagnostic …

I initially had a very positive experience with Dr Ralph Abraham at London Medical. Communication was quick, and we were able to secure an appointment promptly, which was reassuring given the urgency of our situation. The consultation fee …

Had an appointment with Dr Abraham - which was great he knows what he is doing, first went to the appointment on 10th April, spent £1200 on appointment and medicines, however realised they have not given me the main medication required, so …

I went to see dr abraham, completely void of moral fibre, told me that i didnt need to see him and took my 295 pounds to sit there and lecture me on who i should be seeing, i wasted my time, and money i was allowed for this one …

Horrible communication , no alignment. 12th Mar’26 had to wait 1.5 hours with my 5 yr old daughter inspite already pre booked appointments. Dr Kuchai was great but reception or support staff didnt care . someone double booked her 12 PM . I …

Thank you for leaving a review. We would like to hear from you to understand the reasons for the 3 rating. Please let us know if you are happy to discuss your experience, david.briggs@londonmedical.co.uk
